primary_split.description: Main train/validation/test split used for Tables 1-3, 5, 7 and the F5_Original walk-forward fold.
primary_split.warmup_note: Dropped by rolling-window feature construction (252-day drawdown, 63-day momentum/credit-spread windows) before any split occurs.

per_horizon_windows.note: Each horizon additionally consumes L=42 lookback days plus H forward-label days, so usable window counts fall below the day counts above and vary by horizon.

walk_forward_folds.description: Section 7.5 walk-forward validation folds. Each fold trains Phase 1/2 from scratch on data through train_end; test_end is the fold's evaluation window. F2/F3 are excluded from significance testing (F2: zero crash-regime days; F3: only 6 crash-regime days).

folds.label: F5_Original
folds.era: Primary test window used throughout the paper

per_horizon_seeds.note: Same formula used in patchtst_macro_leakfix.py, patchtst_walkforward.py, and sota_baselines.py for every model, including the PatchTST backbone baseline row in the SOTA-comparison table.
